text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After an eventful year in the Classics, the first day
of senior year has arrived.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Sigh... There's quite a number of people gathered, though I suppose this is to be expected of a shrine at New Year's.
choice_data_list: Aren't you cold in that outfit?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Hmph. Isn't it obvious just by looking at me?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Of course I'm cold!
choice_data_list: ...Do you want me to get your coat?
...Do you want to borrow my coat?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: ...I-I'm fine now... But... maybe I'll need it later...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Looking at her legs shaking, I worry about her
catching a cold.

text_block_list.name: Shrine Visitor
text_block_list.text:
Hey, hey, did you see the New Year's
announcement?!

text_block_list.name: Chaperone
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I saw it. Special Week and Seiun Sky are
going to run in the spring Tenno Sho, right?

text_block_list.name: Shrine Visitor
text_block_list.text: No, no! Not that!

text_block_list.name: Chaperone
text_block_list.text:
Then, are you talking about what El Condor
Pasa's doing overseas? Or maybe about Grass
Wonder?

text_block_list.name: Shrine Visitor
text_block_list.text: No! Not them either! Aghhh...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
...Hehe, it seems like everyone is finally starting
to notice me.

text_block_list.name: Shrine Visitor
text_block_list.text:
Look over there! It's her! She's been trending at number
one online!

text_block_list.name: Chaperone
text_block_list.text:
You're right! I remember the headline: "Unforeseen
Detour, Nepo Baby Runs Wild!" Also, look at what she's
wearing. Doesn't she know it's winter?

text_block_list.name: Shrine Visitor
text_block_list.text:
I know, right? I should take a picture with her. I bet you
it'll go viral!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Well, you know what they say: there's no such
thing as bad publicity.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
No matter what the story, I must be the lead. I'll
take whatever steps necessary.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I'm prepared for whatever anyone has to say, so
long as I'm the center of their attention.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Heh. That's what it means to be first-rate. You
keep your head high, puff your chest out, and
steal everyone's hearts.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: So, without further ado...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Everyone!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I am the first-rate Umamusume, King Halo! And I
look forward to your continued support this year!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Photos are welcome, but we must be mindful of
the other visitors! Please take care not to disturb
them!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
That said, I have places I need to be, but those
hoping to get a photo with me are welcome to
come along.

text_block_list.name: Shrine Visitor
text_block_list.text: Really?! Hmm, I think I just might go!

text_block_list.name: Chaperone
text_block_list.text:
H-hey! Well... I guess I'll come get some pictures
too.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Make sure I look cute, okay?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Phew. Well, that does it for the impromptu photo
session.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After a whirlwind of events, King Halo manages
to take photos with hundreds of people.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I'm exhausted. But it was a pretty good strategy, don't you think?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I'm looking forward to the moment when the
seeds I just planted blossom at the
Takamatsunomiya Kinen.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: ....Achoo!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Oh, you're so considerate! ♪ A drink would be
perfect.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... but just one won't do. I'm parched, and
exhausted to boot.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
So, I'm granting you the right to come along with
me to the vending machine.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
You can buy one for yourself as well. I made you
wait all this time, so you're probably freezing as
well.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Ah! I should get some for everyone back at the
academy too. We can have a New Year's tea
party tonight!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After taking a break with some hot tea, we enjoy
the rest of the New Year's holiday together.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Hehe, I guess you remembered.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Give it here, now. Quickly! I'm freezing!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She rips my coat away from me.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Ohohoho! If you want it back, you'll have to catch
me!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I should remind you. The usual New Year's
party starts at seven!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I'm granting you the right to make the necessary
preparations! Ohohoho! Ohohoho!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She dashes away at full speed, taking my stolen
coat along with her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her face turns a flushed red as she runs. This
might be her fastest sprint yet.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Agh!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, delete that photo right this instant! Hurry
up! I mean it!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
There's no way can I let such a candid photo
reach the public! If this shot of me sneezing gets
leaked, my approval rating will plummet!
choice_data_list:
Are sure it won't go up? The photo's kind of
cute.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Of course it won't, you dummy! How many screws
do you have missing?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: I swear, give me that cell phone right now!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She takes my phone and immediately deletes the
photo.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Good riddance! You could've said something if
you wanted a photo. I'll let you take as many as
you want tomorrow.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Come on, everyone, smile! Who's the first-rate
Umamusume?

text_block_list.name: King Halo's Followers
text_block_list.text: King!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...And so, here I am the next day, filling the role
of King's personal photographer at her party.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Ugh! Trainer! Concentrate on your role as
photographer!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
You must capture the magnificence of this
first-rate model! Come along, try a few shots from
this angle!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I guess both of us are polishing our skills.
